name: China Industrial Steel Inc.
summary: China Industrial Steel Inc., through its subsidiaries, produces and sells of steel plates, bars/wires, and billets. The company offers long products, such as pipes, tubes, wires, and rods; flat products, including hot-rolled steel or cold-rolled steel strips; and reinforcing steel products. It is also involved in reselling byproducts of its production process comprising offcuts of steel plates and steel drops; and oxygen gas and others. The company's products are used in construction, equipment manufacturing, and infrastructure projects. It sells its products through distributors and traders in the People's Republic of China. China Industrial Steel Inc. was founded in 2007 and is based in New York, New York.
